skill.name: firebase-ai-logic
skill.description: Official skill for integrating Firebase AI Logic (Gemini API) into web applications. Covers setup, multimodal inference, structured output, and security.
skill.summary: Official skill for integrating Firebase AI Logic (Gemini API) into web applications. Covers setup, m...
skill.author: firebase

security_audit.summary: Static analysis flagged many Ruby backtick patterns, but the reviewed lines are markdown code fences, inline command examples, or JavaScript snippets rather than hidden Ruby execution. The remaining concern is legitimate Firebase CLI setup guidance that can install packages, contact Firebase services, and modify project configuration, so publication is acceptable with a medium-risk warning.

medium_findings.title: Firebase CLI Commands Can Modify Local and Project State
medium_findings.description: The skill recommends installing Firebase globally and running Firebase CLI commands. These commands are legitimate for Firebase setup, but they can change the developer environment, list Firebase resources, initialize project files, and enable Firebase AI Logic services.
medium_findings.confidence_reasoning: The referenced lines directly instruct users to run npm and npx Firebase CLI commands. The commands target official Firebase tooling and show setup intent, so the risk is operational rather than malicious.

low_findings.title: Official Documentation URLs Trigger Network Heuristic
low_findings.description: The hardcoded URLs point to Firebase documentation pages. They do not show credential exfiltration or untrusted download behavior, but they still direct users to external web resources.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: All cited URLs are visible Firebase documentation links. I found no evidence that these links send local data or secrets to a third party.

low_findings.title: Static Ruby Backtick and Weak Crypto Hits Are False Positives
low_findings.description: The Ruby backtick detections occur in markdown examples or inline command text, not executable Ruby files. The weak cryptographic algorithm hit on the description line has no supporting cryptographic code.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: The scanned files are markdown content and the affected reference file contains JavaScript code blocks. I found no Ruby code execution or weak cryptographic implementation at the cited locations.

dangerous_patterns.title: External Command Guidance
dangerous_patterns.description: The skill includes npm and npx commands for Firebase setup. Users should review the selected Firebase project before running initialization commands.
dangerous_patterns.confidence_reasoning: The commands are explicit and can affect local or Firebase project state. They use official Firebase packages, so this is a controlled setup risk rather than evidence of malware.

content.user_title: Build Firebase AI Logic Into Web Apps
content.value_statement: Developers need clear patterns for adding Gemini features to Firebase web applications. This skill provides setup steps, SDK examples, and production guidance for Firebase AI Logic.
actual_capabilities: Explains Firebase AI Logic setup for web applications.
Shows JavaScript patterns for text generation and chat sessions.
Provides multimodal examples for image and file analysis.
Covers streaming responses for real-time user interfaces.
Describes structured JSON output with Firebase AI Logic.
Highlights App Check and Remote Config production practices.
limitations: Focuses mainly on Firebase Web SDK examples.
Does not provide complete Android, iOS, Flutter, or Unity walkthroughs.
Requires developers to configure Firebase projects and billing where needed.
References current Firebase and Gemini behavior that may change over time.

use_cases.title: Add Gemini Text Features
use_cases.description: Implement prompt-based generation in a Firebase web app using Firebase AI Logic and the Web SDK.

use_cases.title: Prototype Multimodal Analysis
use_cases.description: Build image or file analysis workflows that pass supported media to Gemini through Firebase AI Logic.

use_cases.title: Prepare AI Features for Production
use_cases.description: Apply App Check, Remote Config, streaming, and model selection guidance before launching AI features.

prompt_templates.title: Start a Basic Integration
prompt_templates.prompt: Help me add Firebase AI Logic to a web app. Show the setup steps, required packages, and a simple text generation flow.

prompt_templates.title: Build a Chat Experience
prompt_templates.prompt: Design a Firebase AI Logic chat flow for my web app. Include session history, message sending, and response handling.

prompt_templates.title: Add Multimodal Input
prompt_templates.prompt: Show how to analyze an uploaded image with Firebase AI Logic. Include file conversion, MIME handling, and response handling.

prompt_templates.title: Plan Production Controls
prompt_templates.prompt: Review my Firebase AI Logic launch plan. Include App Check, Remote Config model selection, billing considerations, and safe rollout steps.

output_examples.input: Add Gemini text generation to my Firebase web app.
output_examples.output: A short implementation plan with package setup, Firebase initialization, model creation, and response handling steps.

output_examples.input: I need Gemini to analyze user-uploaded images.
output_examples.output: A multimodal workflow that explains file conversion, MIME type handling, prompt composition, and result display.

output_examples.input: Make my Firebase AI Logic feature production ready.
output_examples.output: A deployment checklist covering App Check, model configuration, billing plan requirements, and Remote Config updates.

best_practices: Enable Firebase App Check before exposing AI features to real users.
Use Remote Config for model names when you need runtime model changes.
Confirm the Firebase project before running CLI initialization commands.
anti_patterns: Do not run Firebase CLI commands against an unknown project.
Do not hardcode model choices when product requirements may change.
Do not send large files inline when Cloud Storage references are more reliable.

faq.question: What does this skill help build?
faq.answer: It helps add Firebase AI Logic and Gemini features to web applications.

faq.question: Does it support multimodal prompts?
faq.answer: Yes. It includes patterns for image and file inputs through Firebase AI Logic.

faq.question: Does it require a backend server?
faq.answer: No. Firebase AI Logic can call supported Gemini models from client-side SDKs.

faq.question: What tools are supported?
faq.answer: The report lists support for Claude, Codex, and Claude Code.

faq.question: Is it safe for production apps?
faq.answer: It includes production guidance, but developers must configure App Check, billing, and Firebase project settings.

faq.question: Why is the security risk medium?
faq.answer: The skill includes legitimate Firebase CLI commands that can modify local files and Firebase project state.
